title: 30PCS Natural Wood Slices Wooden Elk Christmas Tree Decorations Blank Hanging Deer Ornaments Wooden Christmas Decorations Reindeer Craft for DIY Crafts Xmas Crafting Supplies
features: Package Includes: 30 pcs elk wooden ornaments and 30 pcs jute twine, sufficient quantity to meet your multiple crafting needs.
Material: Made of natural wooden, lightweight and durable, the surface is smooth, not easy to break or hurt your hands.
DIY Christmas Decorations : The surfaces of elk ornaments are blank, you can paint or write, you can release your imagination and creativity to DIY your own Christmas ornaments.
Easy to use: Each Christmas wooden ornament comes with a small hole which can be threaded with twine, you can hang it on Christmas trees, windows, doors or anywhere that you want.
Wide application: Suitable for all kinds of DIY crafts, Christmas ornaments, gift tags, photo props, wedding decorations, etc.
